orchestrator_notes: AGENTS: Read this file BEFORE starting. Check orchestrator_directives first — if STOP, halt immediately. This is a zero-visual-change sweep replacing remaining hardcoded inline values with existing tokens/classes. Run full Vitest suite after changes. Commit. Then STOP. CRLF WARNING: pre-commit hook fires on first commit — re-stage after hook auto-fix.

sessions.title: Agent/Status Color Tokens in Templates
planned_tasks: Replace ~45 hardcoded agent/status hex colors in template style= attributes
Use hexToRgba() + getAgentColor() or CSS var(--agent-*-primary) tokens
Focus on ProductDetailsDialog, MessageItem, RecentMemoriesList, BroadcastPanel, RoleBadge
Extract repeated patterns to scoped CSS classes
tasks_completed: ProductDetailsDialog: 5 static style= attributes → :style bindings using hexToRgba + getAgentColor/getStatusColor tokens
MessageItem: senderHex, PRIORITY_COLORS, STATUS_COLORS replaced with getAgentColor()/getStatusColor() calls
RecentMemoriesList: typeColors map replaced with getAgentColor() + hexToRgba (removed hardcoded rgba strings)
BroadcastPanel: STATUS_COLORS replaced with token calls; .recipient-chip CSS uses $color-agent-implementor SCSS var
RoleBadge: removed local hexToRgb function, replaced with imported hexToRgba; ROLE_COLORS use getAgentColor()
Full Vitest suite: 99 files, 1916 tests — all passing
deviations: BroadcastPanel had a local getStatusColor function conflicting with the imported getStatusColor from statusConfig — renamed local to getStatusVuetifyColor to avoid clash
sessions.notes_for_next: All agent/status hex colors in templates are now tokenized. Remaining inline styles are layout (display:flex, gap, white-space, max-height) and data-driven :style bindings — those are 0874b scope.
sessions.summary: Replaced hardcoded hex colors across 5 components with centralized token utilities (hexToRgba, getAgentColor, getStatusColor). Zero visual change. All 1916 tests pass.

sessions.title: Layout Utilities + Whitespace + Final Verification
planned_tasks: Replace ~39 layout inline styles with Vuetify utility classes
Create whitespace utility classes if 3+ usages, leave 1-2 inline
Run final inline style count audit

WelcomeView: replaced display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px with d-flex align-center ga-2
ContextPriorityConfig: replaced 2 chip inline styles with Vuetify classes + scoped .always-on-chip/.always-on-label CSS
Created .text-pre-wrap utility class in main.scss (8 usages across 4 files)
ProductTuningReview: replaced 4 style='white-space: pre-wrap' with text-pre-wrap class
ProductDetailsDialog: replaced 2 style='white-space: pre-wrap' with text-pre-wrap class
RecentMemoriesList: replaced style='white-space: pre-wrap' with text-pre-wrap class (kept line-height inline)
ProjectReviewModal: replaced style='white-space: pre-wrap' with text-pre-wrap class
Final audit: 69 static inline styles (was 142, target <100), 58 dynamic :style (was 81, target <60) — both targets met
Full Vitest suite: 99 files, 1916 tests — all passing
deviations: AgentExport gap:25px kept inline — 25px is a non-standard spacing value (ga-6=24px), one-off usage
ProductDetailsDialog pre-line instances (2) kept inline — below 3-usage threshold per handover spec
